name: ballerina
description: Ballerina language support for Claude Code — LSP code intelligence and AI coding assistant for writing integrations, discovering libraries, and running projects

hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/mcp/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/mcp/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && npm install) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"
